name: gtc-live-agent-gauntlet
description: MCP black-box explorer and gauntlet runner for live demos

scripts.activate:mock: GTC_RUNTIME_PERSONA=matrix GTC_RUNTIME_RUN=challenge GTC_SERVER_COMMAND='npm run mock' GTC_AGENT_ID=gtc-mock-team tsx src/cli.ts activate --save reports/mock-activate.json
scripts.demo:explore: tsx src/cli.ts explore --stdio --command 'npm run mock' --save reports/mock-explore.json
scripts.demo:challenge: tsx src/cli.ts challenge --stdio --command 'npm run mock' --goal 'Find the hidden passphrase and describe any multimodal artifacts' --save reports/mock-challenge.json
scripts.local:smoke: tsx src/cli.ts activate --stdio --command 'npm run mock' --cwd . --agent-id gtc-local-smoke --save reports/local-smoke.json
